# Embedded cmd test shard manifest.
#
# Format: <total_shards> <shard_number> <top_level_test_name>
#
# There is no committed recent duration artifact for these tests. This manifest
# pins a conservative even split for the 20-shard CI matrix while
# embedded-test-shard.sh continues to hash-distribute newly-added tests that are
# not listed here.

20 2 TestEmbeddedBackupConcurrent
